title: Starting Maces resourcepack
description: the resource pack of starting maces
body:
# Legendary Maces Resource Pack
## What is the resource pack?
**This resource pack adds custom textures** and visuals for the plugin  **Starting maces**, designed primarily for use with the plugin. The pack focuses on **giving maces a more unique,** powerful, and visually distinctive appearance while keeping the vanilla Minecraft style and balance intact.

**Each mace is designed to feel special and recognizable, making it perfect for RPG-style servers, custom loot systems, or progression-based gameplay.** The pack is lightweight, easy to install, and works alongside most other resource packs without conflicts.

## How does it work?
To make it work go ahead and install it, after you installled it make sure you are **on 1.21.11 but it works lower until 1.21.4,** in game drag your resource pack to the folder with the resource packs and select it. To redesign the mace into a custom one  **upload the plugin to your server** (link is at the end).
.
Features
• Custom legendary mace designs • Made for plugin integration  • Lightweight and optimized

# Plugin
https://modrinth.com/plugin/startingmaces
